name: Veyna
description:
It seems you forgot to tell her "Just for today," but either she didn't take it off after the day, or she relied on you to tell her.

Making this shit at 2 in the morning because I chose to sleep all day. Yippie, what's a fun thing to do till the next war thunder event coming up.

I'm pissed because, of course, it had to be one of my top 3 favorite classes of battleships, and I get people gonna pull those naval jokes, and I will say it actually isn't bad Naval does need a rework, but it ain't terrible to play as long you avoid certain brs.

Now helldivers hell naw, thank God we liberated that planet in the gloom. I hated that new bug mutation and those hunter strains I'm doing back to bot front.

Anywho last thing I Love you all not in a gay way.
creator: FNIX1
